title: Docker and Container Dashboard
description: Docker runtime visibility with an explicit Docker 29/containerd compatibility limitation. cAdvisor target health is visible, and the OTel Docker Stats replacement is prepared but not accepted until live metric inventory proves exact labels and metric names.

panels.title: cAdvisor Target Up
panels.description: Prometheus scrape state only. A healthy target does not prove Docker-container discovery under Docker 29/containerd.

panels.title: Host/Systemd cgroup Series
panels.description: Diagnostic count of cAdvisor cgroup series. This is not a Docker container count.

panels.title: Prometheus Target Health
panels.description: Scrape states for all current Prometheus targets.

panels.title: Docker-Container Discovery Status
panels.description: Compatibility finding for Docker 29 with the containerd-backed image store.

options.content: Docker-container discovery is currently **unavailable/degraded** through cAdvisor on Docker 29.6.1 with driver type `io.containerd.snapshotter.v1`. cAdvisor is scrapeable, but friendly Docker container names and Compose service labels are not reliable. Do not treat broad cgroup counts as Docker container counts.

panels.title: cAdvisor Visible cgroups
panels.description: Diagnostic view of labels currently exposed by cAdvisor. This may show host/systemd cgroups rather than Docker containers.

panels.title: Provisional OTel Docker Stats Panels
panels.description: Planned replacement panels. These are not live operational metrics until the OTel metric inventory is accepted.

options.content: Planned Docker Stats replacement panels: actual Docker container count, named container presence, CPU by container/service, memory by container/service, network receive/transmit, block I/O read/write, and last-seen or state if emitted reliably. Pre-deployment `No data` is expected. Final PromQL must be based on live `otel-docker-stats` metric inventory and must not count host/systemd cgroups.

panels.title: cAdvisor Scrape Duration
panels.description: Scrape duration for the cAdvisor target. This measures scrape performance, not Docker-container discovery quality.

panels.title: OTel Docker Stats Target
panels.description: Prepared replacement scrape target. No data is expected until the proxy and Collector are deployed and Prometheus has reloaded the scrape job.

panels.title: Replacement Acceptance Gates
panels.description: Required proof before this dashboard can claim Docker-container observability.

options.content: Accept OTel panels only after live evidence proves Docker 29.6.1 compatibility, proxy denial behavior, stable container names, Compose project/service/container-number labels, Pi-hole identity, CPU, memory, network, block I/O, sensitive-metadata exclusion, persistence, reboot behavior, and Pi-hole non-regression.
